stocks.impact_theory: Intel reported blowout Q1 2026 earnings with revenue beat and strong AI guidance, fueling semiconductor rally despite Middle East tensions. Economic implications include boosted AI infrastructure spending; market psychology shows FOMO in chips amid tech recovery. Historical parallel: NVDA 2023 AI surge. Analogies: Like a phoenix rising from turnaround ashes; rocket igniting semis sector.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Q1 beat expectations, PT hikes to $110 street high, X posts hype chip fire; web news confirms surge on AI boom.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 10-15% gains on continued AI momentum pre-earnings season.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid short, high short squeeze risk in hot sector.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Competition from AMD/TSMC, margin pressures, geopolitical chip bans.

stocks.justification: Strong earnings beat, analyst upgrades, sector leadership confirmed by multiple sources.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long targeting $350 on ad/cloud strength, 8-12% upside.
